overall.description: Gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 showing a player driving a futuristic cream-colored convertible through Night City. The journey begins in an industrial district with concrete overpasses and power lines, transitions through sunlit commercial intersections, and descends into a neon-lit underground tunnel system.

scene_state.functional_zone: industrial highway with concrete retaining walls and overhead power lines

agents.ego_description: accelerating along a multi-lane industrial road with concrete walls on both sides

entered.detail: tall gray concrete walls lining both sides of the roadway
large metal and concrete overpass structure spanning the road ahead
tall electrical transmission towers with multiple power lines
industrial chimneys emitting white smoke visible in the distance

segments.scene_description: The segment opens on an industrial city highway with tall concrete walls flanking the road. The player drives a futuristic convertible toward an elevated highway overpass, with industrial power pylons visible against a clear morning sky. Sparse traffic moves along the multi-lane road.

scene_state.functional_zone: commercial intersection district with traffic control

events.description: stopping at red traffic light at intersection, then proceeding on green
accelerating through intersection while passing under elevated highway

agents.ego_description: navigating through city intersections, stopping at traffic lights and accelerating with traffic flow

notable_agents.action: black sedan driving parallel in the left lane maintaining speed

entered.detail: horizontal metal structure supporting traffic signals spanning the road
multi-story urban buildings with storefronts at street level
large advertising screens mounted on building facades
tropical trees lining the right side of the street

segments.scene_description: The vehicle exits the industrial corridor into a commercial district with traffic-controlled intersections. After stopping at a red light, the car accelerates through the crossing beneath an elevated highway structure. Commercial buildings and digital billboards line the streets, with occasional pedestrians visible on sidewalks.

scene_state.functional_zone: dense downtown commercial district transitioning to covered roadway

events.description: entering covered roadway beneath elevated highway structure with reduced natural light
transitioning from mixed natural light to predominantly artificial neon lighting

agents.ego_description: cruising through downtown streets passing under multiple overpasses and approaching tunnel entrance

entered.detail: illuminated corporate signage and advertisements on building facades
tall futuristic skyscrapers with reflective glass exteriors
enclosed ceiling structure of the underpass with integrated lighting

segments.scene_description: Driving through the dense downtown district, the vehicle passes beneath elevated highway structures that increasingly obscure the sky. Neon signs and modern glass skyscrapers dominate the visual field as the environment transitions from open streets to a covered roadway with artificial lighting becoming prominent.

scene_state.functional_zone: underground tunnel with neon lighting and ventilation systems

events.description: entering fully enclosed underground tunnel with red emergency lighting on walls
passing through section with large industrial ventilation fans and bright digital advertisements

agents.ego_description: navigating through underground tunnels following a truck ahead, surrounded by neon-lit walls

notable_agents.action: white truck maintaining distance ahead in the tunnel

entered.detail: low concrete ceiling with linear fluorescent lighting fixtures
continuous blue and white neon tubes running along tunnel walls
large industrial circular fans mounted on tunnel walls
illuminated billboards displaying animated advertisements on tunnel walls

segments.scene_description: The vehicle descends into a fully enclosed underground tunnel system where natural light disappears completely. The environment is illuminated by artificial neon strips and digital billboards. The tunnel features red-painted walls with large industrial ventilation fans, creating a cyberpunk atmosphere distinct from the sunlit streets above.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous drive through a futuristic city that transforms from a bright industrial highway into a neon-lit underground tunnel. It begins on a multi-lane road flanked by tall concrete walls and industrial power pylons under a clear morning sky. As the vehicle exits this corridor, the scene opens into a sunlit commercial district where the car navigates traffic-controlled intersections beneath elevated highway structures and digital billboards. The environment then shifts toward a dense downtown area where glass skyscrapers and neon signs increasingly obscure the sky, transitioning the lighting from natural daylight to artificial glow. Finally, the camera descends into a fully enclosed tunnel system where natural light disappears completely, replaced by red-painted walls, industrial ventilation fans, and vibrant neon strips.
